title: Error 'Server has no JMAP Chat account' is not actionable
description: client_task.rs run: when session.chat_account_id() is None, the user sees: 'Server has no JMAP Chat account — check that the server supports the JMAP Chat extension'. At 2am this tells the user nothing actionable. They do not know whether the problem is a wrong URL, a missing server config flag, a wrong account, or a server version that predates the capability. Fix: name the exact capability URI expected (urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat), and suggest checking the server's /.well-known/jmap response to verify the capability is advertised.
close_reason: Opinion: error message wording per SEC7
